label: Calculate KPI columns ­– PBI Count, Failed Orders, and On-time Percentage

inputs.name: in_pbi_column
inputs.label: Column that tells whether an order exists in PBI (e.g. “In PBI” for China/Costa Rica, “PBI” for Malaysia/Vietnam)

inputs.name: in_pbi_yes_value
inputs.label: Exact cell value that means “Yes, this order is in Power BI” (for example Yes, Y, or TRUE)

inputs.name: total_order_col
inputs.label: Column holding the total number of orders this row represents (usually called “Total Order”)

inputs.name: precision
inputs.label: How many decimal places to show for the On-time % result
